review_title: Using XLstat for advanced multivartiate statistical analysis
description: It improved my way to customize analysis and it also made me simlper to try new stat tools
author: Giulio C.
pros: Easy way to customize analysis and getting accurate results
cons: Not all options about stat analysis are present (but it's a minor aspect)

review_title: Great powerful and easy to usestat software
description: I have been using it for almost two decades, and I am very satisfied. I migrated from older Statview and Systat, a great move.
author: Carlos T.
pros: One feature I like very much about XLSTAT is that it is an excel add-in and works very well with several of Excel´s features. The software is very poweful, does all of the analyses an ecologist and animal behaviorist would need. Specially, since it can integrate R scripts. This flexibility is probably its greatest feature. It is also easy to use with a great user-interface.
cons: The standard graphs could be more flexible and maleable, but I guess that is the function of Sigmaplot.

description: Horrible - do not buy this! it claims to do plm but does not estimate all of the parameters of the exogenous variables specified in the econometric equation
author: Monica G.
pros: Nothing - the trial version is a joke - and if the version that people pay for is anything like it do not buy
cons: It totally messed up my excel file - and did not work at all
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I recommend every researcher/student buy XLSTAT
description: I handle most of my sensory evaluation data and consumer data using XLSTAT. It is super easy and smooth to complete the data feeding – processing – reporting procedure. Now it only takes me 10 mins to finish all thoes steps (without XLSTAT, 2–3 days might not be enough)
author: Shaoyang W.
pros: Economic, user-friendly, comprehensive online tutorial, customised training courses, best integration to Excel, up-to-date solutions, customer service
cons: Some functions have bugs that cause Excel collapse. I always identify these bugs and report them to Addinsoft. They always contact me the next day and fix these bugs as fast as they can.

description: Very great. The XLSTAT is so helpful to me. The best part is where Sen's slope test is incorporated in Mann-Kendall analysis, an aspect often missing in great softwares like SAS.
author: Irene O.
pros: Easy to follow and simplifies complex analysis. The analysis commands are easy to locate and use. The signing in feature boosts security.
cons: The limitations on graphics and data visualization as it requires additional purchase of Zenplot. It is restricted to one machine so I have to carry my laptop to wherever I need to work.

review_title: Clinical research physician - this is an excellent program.
description: Have used it for at least 7 years - gradual improvements in integration into Excel have made it very easy to use now.
author: Reginald B.
pros: Integration with Excel with full range of stats. Easy ability to run on filtered data. Excellent tutorials.
cons: Basic stats should include survival statistics - found another program to do this for less than the upgrade to life sciences

review_title: XLSTAT is great for life science statistical analysis
description: I have XLSTAT as an add-on for my MS Excel, but hadn't used it in several months. I was delighted to find out it's as user-friendly as before.
author: Jonas B.
pros: Offer easy-to-follow tutorials and sample workbooks.
cons: There are a lot of hidden worksheets that are generated for various tasks. This can make your workbook very large if you perform a lot of statistical analysis.

description: XLSTAT is an efficient and user-friendly statistical analysis tool. It integrates seamlessly with Excel, making data analysis straightforward. The wide range of features is beneficial, though some complex functions require extra time to master
author: Ozlem S.
pros: Fast and easy to use. No need to modify data before transferring to other programs.
cons: Some advanced features require additional learning, and the pricing can be a bit high for individual users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Statistical software powerful and user friendly
description: Xlstat is exactly the statistical software I need. Namely - but not only- for multivariate analysis
author: Christophe M.
pros: Excellent experience. User friendly and intuitive.
cons: I am sure I am not using the full potential of the vew features related to R and the assistance.

description: Very satisfactory, the results according to the methodology, explanation of each of the methodologies on the Web and other aids, very fast response and flexibility when contracting a license.
author: Reynaldo Manuel C.
pros: Versatility of data analysis, essential in basic research
cons: Although it is a very good and useful tool in data analysis, the cost is very high if you want the premium license, mainly in countries where research is very little recognized.
author_profession: Head of the Water Resources area
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's a very high powered add on to Excel
author: Larry C.
pros: It has a very nice user interface with Excel. It is easy to use with small to moderately sized databases.
cons: I still have problems maintaining the scripts for the runs I do and redoing my old runs.

description: Satisfactory, I use it daily. It is my priority software in my data analysis
author: FRANCISCO V.
pros: The Excel compatibility, It is certainly a great addition.
cons: The need to always include the data description

description: Quite a large range: social sciences data, engineering data, medical data .. It can be used in all fields ...
author: Rosun S.
pros: Quite a large number of techniques implemented. We can even say Exhaustive. No prior training required for technicals. Very fast for non-technicals to get used to it as well.
cons: No missing feature in my brief period of use: trial version. Price on the high side.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, it is perfect software. I'm willing to use this software after I graduate.
author: Min Jeong K.
pros: when ANOVA is needed to test, I've never seen such an easy software as Xlstat. Also, since we can adjust the figure using excel, it is so convenient software.
cons: it might be helpful if there's some software for metabolomics tools. There are only few of options available, but i was wondering if we can use the volcano plot.

description: Overall, it covers the essential sensory tools and methodologies used by Sensory Science these days such as TCATA, Temporal and Time Intensity. Still fiddling on these features.
author: Siau Choon S.
pros: Tutorials and the statistical rationale behind the step. Technically sound.
cons: Window commands and prompt messages. It takes a while to understand the lingo.

review_title: Easy, quick, convenient and sufficient, also saves time!
description: Best part of my job, as it saves time for me on a busy day and I can manage the workload or heap of work as I know with stats analysis I am covered and then I can worry about other things,.
author: Valeria X.
pros: Graph illustrations, error bars, and descriptive stats.And, ANOVA is the best function ever, everything you need is there!
cons: So far have not encountered any hardships as the support and IT team or assistance is always there to assist one.

author: Betsy G.
pros: Too much to note here. Probably that it is so inexpensive that I have never had any pushback when purchasing one of a dozen or so licenses I have had over the years.
cons: I don't feel like answering this and I can't find the code easily enough to change the rule, so I'll just say having to answer this question.

review_title: Go to statistical software package for years
description: Most of my work is in conventional statistical analysis and sensometrics. XLSTAT helps me to get the most out of my client's data with peace of mind that the analyses are done properly and that the conclusions are reliable.
author: Leanie L.
pros: XLSTAT is easy to use (provided you have good theoretical know-how) and compatible with Excel which makes reporting a dream. It's compatible with R as well for additional functionality, although XLSTAT's functionality, especially in sensometrics is already very good.
cons: Not all of the tests are set up to handle multiple variables at once leading to a lot of manual labor. However, this is the exception and not the rule.

description: Our group is responsible for a large number of sensory tests. XLSTAT makes it easy to turn these studies around quickly with the tables and charts it produces.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: XLSTAT makes multivariate analysis a snap. I have been a SAS user since 1982 and use it for some analysis where I need the detailed diagnostics. However, I try to utilize statistics packages that are easier to use when possible which makes it much simpler to instruct more junior scientists how to perform advanced analysis and XLSTAT is really good for this. I make it a practice to check any new statistical package against SAS results and XLSTAT passes with flying colors.
cons: The only problem I have encountered with XLSTAT is having EXCEL crash n occasion, though this may have more to do with how our IT department has configured our computers.

description: I'm a geoscientist who deals with tremendous geochemical data. Previously, I completed a task by using multiple softwares, and unfortunately some cannot be done. XLSTAT is a trustworthy helper.
author: Xin L.
pros: As a computational geoscientist and a user of the BASIC version, I found XLSTAT easy to use. The data preparation, description, analysis, visualization, and non-parametric test etc. are very useful features. They helped a lot about geoscientific data processing.
cons: If possible, could consider adding the part for compositional data analysis (CoDA) to the BASIC version. A little suggestion.

description: I do clinical trials and lab data analysis (and quality control) and am happy with the overall performance. Cut and paste to the reports is easy. Fine tool.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: First, it is not based on an enormous statistical package and the articulation with Excel is most of the time excellent. Second it is very reliable and easy to use (at least if you are a little bit familiar with the field). Third, it does many things and some versions are very complete, enough to satisfy in most cases all your needs. Fourth, you'll find very specialised analysis or tests beside the common ones. Fifth, the value for money is excellent and the accompanying doc is extensive.
cons: Well, some repetitive analysis are boring, but it does the job.
author_profession: Cofounder and CEO. Chief scientific and medical officer.

description: I am using the software to analyze scientific data. My overall experience is good but solving the problem of big data will make better.
author: Emmanuel Oladeji A.
pros: Modelling Data feature, very easy to use.
cons: I have it very difficult to analyze big data using XLSTAT.

review_title: Data Analysis Made Easy with XLSTAT
description: I was never a statistician but with XLSTAT I learnt so much. There tutorials are great they explain you in simple language, easy to follow. I love XLSTAT. I couldn’t have thought of any better software than this.
author: Jyotishree R.
pros: * Ease of use * Very good and clear tutorials * Convenient and doesn’t take a lot of time for analysis * Lot of features to choose from for the data analysis * One place and rate provides all * Great customer support
cons: * I have not faced anything yet * Probably some features are not available in everything but customer support always helps and caters to your request!

description: Excellent
author: Hussam T.
pros: It is very user friendly. Anyone with basic understanuser-friendlyding of statistics can use it.
cons: Visualization can be improved to help display the results of statistical analysis. I also like that in some parts, an explanation is provided to help interpret the results of the analysis. I encourage doing this more and if possible to all inferential statistics.

review_title: Review of XLSTAT - How it saved my PhD research
description: I used XLSTAT in undertaking the preliminary analysis required for hydrological studies, including, (i) missing data imputation, (ii) trend and homogeneity test, (iii) outlier test and (iv) autocorrelation. The processess where easy and step-wise, compared to other tools that required mastering of coding languaged and data processing in particular formats. It saved me a great deal of time in my Thesis development.
author: Iguniwari T.
pros: Ease of use, interpretation of results and accompanying tutorial for easy development of capacity.
cons: Which the cost can be reduced for early-career researchers in developing countries.
